series_metadata.series_description: This file contains official documents from ORDC bi-monthly Commission meetings and includes such items as agendas, resolutions, approved project briefings, scopes of work, minutes and audio tapes.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain microfilm and scanned files permanently. ; Paper: Retain entire packet on-site for a period of five (5) years. After the 5-year period, scan all documents in the packet. ; Electronic: Retain audio tapes and audio files until written meeting minutes are approved., Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
